title: Japan's Mitsui OSK shares soar to record highs as activist investor Elliott builds 'significant' stake
summary_full: Shares of Japanese shipping firm Mitsui OSK surged to a record high after Elliott Investment Management said it had established a "significant" stake.
summary_public: Shares of Japanese shipping firm Mitsui OSK surged to a record high after Elliott Investment Management said it had established a "significant" stake.
